title: Smart Data Models - MRP Lot
description: A traceable batch of product received from a supplier or produced in-house. Lots enable end-to-end traceability from raw material receipt through production to finished-goods shipment. Only products with trackingPolicy 'lot' or 'serial' carry lot references.

type.description: NGSI-LD Entity type. Must be Lot.

value.description: Human-readable lot or batch number as assigned by the supplier or production system.

lotCode.description: The lot/batch number. Must be unique within the scope of a product.

expirationDate.description: ISO 8601 date after which the lot must not be used. Optional; omit for non-perishable materials.

origin.description: Origin of the lot — typically the supplier name or the manufacturing order that produced it.

value.description: pending: awaiting quality check; approved: cleared for use; quarantine: held pending investigation; rejected: blocked from use.

qualityStatus.description: Quality disposition of the lot. Only lots with qualityStatus 'approved' may be issued to production.

value.description: active: quantity still available; consumed: all stock used; expired: past expiration date.

product.description: Reference to the Product this lot belongs to.
